title: Mace Leveler
description: A Mace that levels up with every player kill, unlocking powerful enchants along the way!
body:
MaceLeveler is a Spigot/Paper plugin that makes the Mace weapon feel truly legendary. The first time you pick up a Mace, you'll be asked to choose your enchant path — Density or Breach — and from then on, every player kill with that Mace levels it up!
🗡️ Enchant Paths:

Density — Levels 1 through 5. At level 4 you unlock Wind Burst I, and at max level you get Wind Burst II, Fire Aspect II, Unbreaking III and Mending.
Breach — Levels 1 through 4. At level 3 you unlock Wind Burst I, and at max level you get Wind Burst II, Fire Aspect II, Unbreaking III and Mending.

⚙️ Fully Configurable:
Edit config.yml directly in your server's file manager to customize which enchants are added at each level, set max levels, and toggle whether mob kills count or only player kills.
✅ Features:

Each Mace is tracked individually using NBT data
Works even if you drop or trade the Mace
Data saves automatically on server restart
Supports Spigot and Paper 1.21.11
